title: Mob Hearts
description: Shows you the hearts of all mobs above their heads.
body:
# Mob Health
ℹ️ _Previously, the project was marked as "Discontinued." This is no longer the case!_

**Displays the hearts of all mobs above their heads.**

![Hearts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55e2c2c67853cad63b89180512018ee9134e7ecf.png)

Hearts from 0-10 are shown with full and half hearts, all hearts from 10 to 20 are shown with absorption hearts. Hearts above 20 are represented by a number before the heart.

Some mobs are excluded from this feature (e.g., villagers) because it is either unnecessary or would lead to other unpredictable errors.

![Chicken Health](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d90ee57bd112b3b0a9b67ec56be2bd253844868b.png)

![Damaged Enderman](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4152c1d7d29ef6b65deb65763a5534e25f40a93.png)
